# Feature: Migrate voice design casting to VoiceCreationAdapter

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-14 — issue #58 -->

**Issue:** #58  
**Epic:** `.qa/design/mve-voice-identity-pipeline.md`  
**Feature slug:** `mve-casting-creation-migration`

## Intent

Voice-Studio-Flow (A/B/C, Play, Save) bleibt in der UI; Casting-Backend delegiert an `resolveVoiceCreationAdapter('qwen-voice-design')` statt `createDesignedVoiceboxProfile`. Speichern materialisiert via `materializeDesignedVoice` (#57).

## Preconditions

- Issue #57 merged (`materializeDesignedVoice`, Sidecar materialize)
- Desktop-App mit lokalem `.scriptony`-Projekt
- Qwen VoiceDesign Sidecar erreichbar (Stub in CI)
- Stimmbeschreibung (Basic oder Advanced) ausgefüllt

## Happy Path

- [ ] `previewVoiceDesignCandidates` ruft `VoiceCreationAdapter.generateCandidates` auf — kein `createDesignedVoiceboxProfile`
- [ ] Drei Kandidaten A/B/C mit Sidecar-Audio; kein `__preview-*` Voicebox-Profil
- [ ] Play nutzt Kandidaten-WAV (Sidecar), nicht Voicebox designed TTS
- [ ] `saveVoiceDesignCandidate` ruft `materializeDesignedVoice` auf
- [ ] Gespeicherte Stimmen erscheinen im Dropdown (`design-saved` Filter gültig)
- [ ] Playwright `mve-voice-design-preview.spec.ts` grün (Sidecar-Mocks)
- [ ] `npm run verify -- --frontend` grün

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Einzelner Kandidat fehlgeschlagen → übrige Kandidaten weiter nutzbar
- [ ] Regenerate einzelner Kandidat → neue Sidecar-Session mit Variation
- [ ] Modal schließen ohne Speichern → keine Voicebox-Preview-Profile zu löschen
- [ ] Bestehendes MVE-Profil beim Speichern → Update statt Duplikat

## Regression

- [ ] „Stimme vorschlagen“ (Katalog) unverändert
- [ ] `design-voice-from-prompt` Legacy-Wrapper nutzt preview + materialize save
- [ ] Global Loading Progress bei Design >5s

## Assumptions

- Sidecar liefert `local://voice-design/sessions/…` audioUrl; Playback via Sidecar-HTTP oder Blob
- Alte Voicebox-designed Profile bleiben abspielbar (kein Migration-Slice)

## Implementation Notes

- Casting: `preview-voice-design-candidates`, `save-voice-design-candidate`, `regenerate-voice-design-candidate`, synthesize helpers → Qwen `VoiceCreationAdapter`
- New: `voice-design-candidate-audio.ts` (sidecar WAV fetch); sidecar GET `/voice-design/sessions/{id}/{file}.wav`
- Save wires `materializeDesignedVoice` (+ `existingProfileId` on materialize)
- Removed A2 `__preview-*` Voicebox designed profile strategy; discard session is no-op
- Tests: preview, save, regenerate, synthesize, candidate-audio; Playwright mocks sidecar
- UI: `VoiceProfileEditorModal` global loading on design + materialize save
